changes.value:
Thin internal module isolating all unsafe ObjC interop from business logic.

- [ ] Add `CoreMLModel` struct wrapping `Retained<MLModel>`
- [ ] Implement `load(path: &Path) -> Result<Self>` using MLModelConfiguration + CPUAndNeuralEngine
- [ ] Implement `predict_embedding(&self, input_ids: &[i32], attention_mask: &[i32], seq_len: usize) -> Result<PredictionOutput>`
- [ ] Create MLMultiArray with MLMultiArrayDataType::Int32 (the bug fix)
- [ ] Write data via getMutableBytesWithHandler + ptr::copy_nonoverlapping
- [ ] Build MLDictionaryFeatureProvider, run prediction
- [ ] Extract output as Vec<f32>, handle both f32 and f16 output types
- [ ] Wrap prediction body in autoreleasepool
- [ ] Map NSError to EmbeddingError::CoreML(message)
- [ ] Implement embedding_dim() to probe output shape
- [ ] cargo check -p ane-embedding
Create src/coreml.rs wrapper module for objc2-core-ml
